problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: If Casimir effect between nanoscale surfaces is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
